<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Create an append-only reactive log (D54/D60). DELTA + lazy pull SNAPSHOT + pullId via
{@link collectionCore}; this layer adds the typed append surface + incremental view/scan.

## Import

```ts
import { reactiveLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/data-structures";
```

## Signature

```ts
function reactiveLog(
	initial?: readonly T[],
	options: ReactiveLogOptions = {},
): ReactiveLog<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `initial` | `readonly T[]` | initial value used by the helper. |
| `options` | `ReactiveLogOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `ReactiveLog<T>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { reactiveLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/data-structures";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/data-structures/reactive-log.ts`
